name: gram_pronoun_object_married_her
body: Jeff married her last spring. They've been inseparable ever since.

name: gram_pronoun_object_told_him
body: Nadia confronted him at the office on Friday and told him she was resigning.

name: gram_pronoun_object_fired_them
body: The regional director, Bram Joost, called them both into his office and fired them on the spot.

name: gram_relative_clause_whom_hired
body: Celeste Fontaine, whom Dana hired last quarter, is already running the Chicago desk.

name: gram_relative_clause_whom_jeff_mentored
body: Marcus Webb, whom Jeff mentored during the fellowship, just made partner at Aldrich & Cole.

name: gram_relative_clause_who_replaced
body: The account went to Priya Nair, who replaced the guy that Sam Voss had recommended.

name: gram_appositive_chain_boss_and_deputy
body: My boss, Dana Okafor, and her deputy, Sam Pike, both signed off on the restructuring plan.

name: gram_appositive_chain_three_people
body: The board named three trustees: my uncle, Ren Takahashi, the retiring CFO, Gwen Ellroy, and an outside counsel, Piotr Saar.

name: gram_appositive_relational_possessive_with_org
body: Jeff's mentor, Osei Quartey, and his long-time colleague, Bea Strand, co-founded Verdant Labs together.

name: gram_coordinated_subjects_adopted_dog
body: Jeff and Celine adopted a dog from the shelter last weekend.

name: gram_coordinated_subjects_three_siblings
body: Rosa, Tomas, and Lena Vargas all moved back home to take care of their father.

name: gram_coordinated_subjects_co_signed
body: Priya and her roommate Darya Volkov co-signed the lease on the new apartment.

name: gram_nested_clause_reported_speech_aunt_rosa
body: Mom said Aunt Rosa moved in with her daughter Luz after the divorce.

name: gram_nested_clause_double_embed
body: I heard that Nadia mentioned that her ex-boyfriend, Ciro Belli, is dating someone from her firm.

name: gram_nested_clause_subordinate_who_told_who
body: Jeff told me that his sister called him to say that their cousin Vera Hopwood is pregnant.

name: gram_reported_speech_uncle_retired
body: Grandma mentioned that Uncle Bert Lowe finally retired and is moving to Tucson.

name: gram_reported_speech_mom_said_neighbor
body: Mom said the Kowalski boy, her neighbor Pavel, got accepted to med school.

name: gram_passive_by_agent_eulogy
body: The eulogy was given by Father Limm, and the reading was done by Priya's cousin Anand.

name: gram_passive_by_agent_terminated
body: Three staff members were terminated by HR director Osei Quartey following the audit.

name: gram_passive_by_agent_surgery_performed
body: The surgery was performed by Dr. Miriam Lau and assisted by her resident, Tobias Renn.

name: gram_possessive_chain_priya_brother_wife
body: Priya's brother's wife, Lena Sood, is a cardiologist at Northwestern.

name: gram_possessive_chain_boss_assistant
body: My boss's assistant's husband, Cliff Ibarra, runs the catering company they used for the gala.

name: gram_long_preamble_object_buried
body: After everything that happened with the merger, the layoffs, and the audit last spring, the person who really held things together was the quiet deputy ops lead, Soren Halberg.

name: gram_long_preamble_health_distractor
body: Had my annual labs done — cholesterol 198, A1c 5.4, all fine. The results were reviewed by Dr. Yael Drori before she forwarded them to my GP, Ines Cabral.

name: gram_four_people_one_sentence_dinner
body: Had dinner with Nadia, her boyfriend Ciro Belli, my old roommate Sasha Windt, and Sasha's sister Faye.

name: gram_four_people_one_sentence_wedding
body: The ceremony was officiated by Pastor Eli Garro, witnessed by Tomas and Lena Vargas, and the rings were carried by little Rosa.

name: gram_four_people_custody_dispute
body: The mediator, Judith Crane, met separately with Marcus, his ex-wife Dara Hollis, and her attorney Bex Ong to try to reach a custody agreement.

name: gram_vague_reference_guy_from_accounting
body: Ran into Priya Nair in the lobby; she was with the guy from accounting who always parks in the visitor spots. Priya said he's been there fifteen years.

name: gram_vague_reference_her_cousin
body: Celeste mentioned her cousin is in town this week and might join us for the hike on Saturday.

name: gram_passive_relative_coordinated_mix
body: The grant was awarded to Dr. Miriam Lau, whom the committee selected over two other finalists, and her co-investigator, Tobias Renn, was brought on shortly after.
